outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected. Positive GEX (1.49B total) suppresses movement, favoring pinning and slow grinding.
outlook.summary: Market is balancing precisely on the 655 Gamma Flip Resonance zone. With dealers long gamma, volatility is suppressed. The high Put OI (PCR > 1.3) creates a hard floor, while the 'Reverse Smirk' in monthlys suggests call demand for upside hedging. Upside targets are Weekly Max Pain (660) and Monthly Max Pain (675).

levels.motivazione: Exact convergence of 0DTE, Weekly, and Monthly significant Put OI with the Aggregate Gamma Flip (655.2). The primary equilibrium point for the market.
Massive structural support. 127k OI (Weekly) and 106k OI (Monthly). Dealers are heavily short puts, creating a 'put wall' defense.
Weekly Max Pain level acting as a magnet. High Call OI (29k) and Put OI (35k) creates a pinning force for the Friday expiry.
Dominant 0DTE Call OI (21k) and High Volume (86k). Immediate resistance for the session.
Monthly Max Pain. With spot at 655 and positive GEX, the gravitational pull is towards this level over the next 30 days.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected: net negative GEX (-14.88B) indicates dealers short gamma, amplifying directional moves. Bearish smirk skew (1.47-1.60) confirms fear premium.
outlook.summary: Spot at 6606.5 sits between 0DTE Max Pain (6625) and Gamma Flip (6703.85). Heavy put concentration at 6600 (24,993 OI Monthly) creates structural support at current levels. Negative GEX in Weekly/Monthly expiries suggests volatility expansion if spot breaks key levels. 6900 and 6400 are RESONANCE levels across all expiries - defining the macro range.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI across ALL expiries: 0DTE (11,762), WEEKLY (5,438), MONTHLY (17,569). Ultimate resistance zone with dealer hedging ceiling.
Significant Put OI across ALL expiries: 0DTE (3,201), WEEKLY (5,665), MONTHLY (22,158). Structural floor with dealer gamma support.
Dominant Call OI in 0DTE (15,348) + WEEKLY (10,528). Primary short-term resistance with high IV (18-24%).
0DTE Gamma Flip level coincides with 6700 CALL OI in 0DTE (7,484) + WEEKLY (5,924). Critical sentiment pivot point.
Largest single Put OI (24,993) in Monthly at spot. Dealer gamma hedging creates sticky support. High Volume/OI ratio confirms activity.
0DTE Max Pain 0.28% below spot. MM target for expiry - upward magnetic pull expected.
Largest Weekly Put OI (8,044) with high IV (31.16%). Bearish skew amplifies importance as secondary support.
Heavy Monthly Put OI (23,490) with elevated IV (23.28%). Intermediate support in bearish structure.
0DTE Put cluster (6,371 OI at 6440 + 6,351 OI at 6430). Near-term support with high volume activity (1,539+3,119).
